response.justification: The candidate is technically excellent and exceeds every required skill — TypeScript, Node, React, REST, SQL/relational databases, AWS, Kubernetes, plus LLM/MCP and AI-agent experience that maps directly onto the nice-to-haves. However, this is an entry-level individual-contributor role, and the applicant is a staff/senior engineer with ~15 years of experience, creating a strong overqualification and retention risk. The role also requires high on-site presence, while the candidate is based in Lagos, Nigeria, and lists only basic German, raising significant logistical and relocation concerns. A conversation could be worthwhile given the AI-platform fit, but level and location mismatches make this a borderline call.
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript, Node, React, AWS, and Kubernetes — covers all required and most nice-to-have skills
Direct LLM/MCP and AI-agent infrastructure experience matching the platform's automation goals
Strong software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) and proven delivery at scale
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level IC role — likely flight/retention and compensation-expectation risk
Location in Lagos conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement; relocation/work-authorization unclear
Only basic German, which may limit on-site collaboration in a German-context consulting/construction domain

key_factors.factor: Full technical skill coverage incl. AI/LLM
